title: asphodelus ramosus var. nervosus
intro: Asphodelus ramosus var. nervosus, also known as the Nerved Jointed Crowfoot or Asphodelus nervosus, is a perennial plant in the Asphodelaceae family characterized by its branching stems and white flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and inflammation due to its anthelmintic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Asphodelus ramosus var. nervosus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are typically used in folk medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
